ratings.name: Daniel Gray
ratings.comments: One of the more complicated math classes I've taken due to many rules to know by name, but after a bit it all clicked and started making a lot of sense.

ratings.name: Chris Smith
ratings.comments: His class was rather easy however you needed to make sure to read the long book he makes you buy as each week requires a discussion post.

ratings.name: Zheni Utic
ratings.comments: Majority of the grade for the class was based on tests but those weren't too bad.

ratings.name: Hao Zhang
ratings.comments: Notes can go by very quickly and he doesn't post them online anywhere, so be sure to pay attention.
